title: Amtech - Mini Claw Hammer, Magnetic Nail Starter, Lightweight and Easy to Use, Ergonomic Anti-Slip Handle, Ideal for Small Repairs and Crafts (8oz / 225g)
availability_text: Only 8 left in stock (more on the way).
features: LIGHTWEIGHT 8oz (225g) DESIGN: Perfect for smaller projects, offering precision and control where a heavier hammer is not required.
DURABLE STEEL SHAFT: Provides long-lasting strength and resilience, built to handle everyday DIY jobs.
COMFORT GRIP HANDLE: Helps reduce hand fatigue and ensures secure handling for more accurate strikes.
MULTI-PURPOSE CLAW: Drives nails with ease while the claw end removes them cleanly, increasing efficiency.
IDEAL FOR LIGHT DUTY TASKS: Great for picture hanging, craft work, and household repairs.
description: The Amtech 8oz Mini Claw Hammer is a compact yet sturdy tool designed for small-scale carpentry, construction, and household projects. Its lightweight design makes it easy to handle, while the magnetic nail-setting function allows for one-handed operation, improving accuracy and convenience. The ergonomic anti-slip handle provides a comfortable grip, reducing hand fatigue during prolonged use. The hammer’s dual-function claw is perfect for both driving nails into various surfaces and extracting them with ease. Additionally, it features a hanging hole at the end of the handle for convenient storage when not in use.
